children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Administrator and the Foundation are authorized to establish the National Oceans and Coastal Security Fund as a tax exempt fund to further the purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There shall be deposited into the Fund amounts appropriated or otherwise made available to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Prohibitions on donations from foreign governments
children.label: 2 Prohibitions on donations from foreign governments
children.text: No amounts donated by a foreign government, as defined in , may be deposited into the Fund.section 7342 of title 5
